# Source Adapter Template

## Purpose
Yeni bir broker/veri kaynagi eklenirken kullanilacak taslak.

## When to read this file
Yeni source adapter gorevlerinde.

## What it controls
Adapter girdileri, ciktilari, validation ve hata akisi.

## What it must not contain
Calisan scraper kodu veya gizli bilgi.

## Related files
`DATA_SOURCES.md`, `PARSING_RULES.md`

## Update rules
Adapter standardi degistikce guncellenir.

## Last updated
2026-06-30

## Template
- Source name:
- Business purpose:
- Assumed access path:
- Allowed acquisition method:
- Raw artifact types:
- Required metadata:
- Extraction candidates:
- Normalization notes:
- Hash/fingerprint strategy:
- Failure modes:
- Manual review triggers:
- Open questions:
